title: Mentorships
subtitle: Learn from master artisans in personalized 1-on-1 sessions
noMentorshipsDesc: Check back soon for new mentorship opportunities

applyModal.title: Apply for Mentorship
applyModal.desc: Send a message to {{name}} explaining why you'd like to learn from them.
applyModal.placeholder: Tell the mentor about yourself, your experience level, and what you hope to learn...

manage: Create and manage your mentorship offerings
noOfferingsDesc: Create your first mentorship offering to start teaching
meetingLinkPrompt: Enter meeting link (Zoom, Google Meet, etc.):
descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what students will learn, your experience, and teaching approach...
deleteConfirm: Delete this mentorship? All applications will be removed.

buyer.trackApplications: Track your mentorship applications and sessions
buyer.paymentRequiredDesc: You have {{count}} mentorship accepted by artisans. Complete payment to start your sessions.
buyer.paymentRequiredDesc_plural: You have {{count}} mentorships accepted by artisans. Complete payment to start your sessions.
buyer.noApplicationsDesc: Browse available mentorships and apply to learn from artisans
buyer.cardOnlyNotice: Mentorship payments require Bank Card payment only.
